heading: OneStream Live
description: Engage with the power of OneStream Live, a cloud-based live streaming platform that seamlessly crafts professional live streams and enables multistreaming to over 45 social media platforms and the web concurrently. The website, studio, and mobile app collectively showcase a user-centric experience, combining intuitive design with seamless backend integration. This collaborative effort results in a dynamic and versatile streaming solution, enhancing the capabilities of content creators across diverse platforms.

heading: Dynamic Drag and drop
description: Experience a library-free project for streaming platforms with diverse layouts. Utilizing precise math, this project allows intuitive drag-and-drop functionality for easy element rearrangement. Whether on mobile or web, enjoy a responsive interface with manual precision, offering effortless switching between layouts. Elevate your streaming experience with this innovative solution.

heading: WorkerX
description: Elevate your scheduling efficiency and customer service excellence with WorkerX. This innovative project empowers you to boost appointment numbers while ensuring a top-notch customer experience.

heading: HSTC engineering
description: A Vanguard in Defense and Security Solutions. Specialized in Military, Defense, and Security domains, we seamlessly integrate cutting-edge technology into our services and products. Prioritizing safety, satisfaction, and integrity, our software solutions redefine excellence in the Defense and Security sectors.

heading: BuildX
description: Revolutionizing construction management. Streamline schedules, connect with your team effortlessly, and bid farewell to traditional tools. This construction software empowers your business with seamless project planning and tracking, complemented by efficient sales processes for lead management and rapid sign-ups. Financial tools ensure precise cash flow tracking and budget management down to the last penny. BuildX is your all-in-one solution for modernizing construction project management.
